title: sleepy's eating animations
description: Adds custom eating animations for every food.
body:
![Main text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3dc67f3f0bde99ef160fc8bde12f56e0747075ae.png)
Every wondered why Minecraft's food just dissapears when you finish eating, but while you eat it it stays the same. Me too. This pack adds unique eating animations for every food in the game.


**Dependencies**
- sleepy's square items
